title: M&G ECONOMIC SINGLE CLIP FILE FOLDER ( A4 )
subtitle: M&G ECONOMIC SINGLE CLIP
overview: Introducing the M&G Economic Single Clip File Folder (A4), a durable and versatile solution for organizing your documents. Crafted from high-quality cardboard, it features a sturdy metal clip to keep your papers secure. Its plain design makes it suitable for various purposes, from storing documents to organizing receipts. With a side strip for easy classification, this folder ensures quick access to your files, making it a practical choice for your file management needs.

title: M&G 3D EXPANDING BAG
subtitle: M&G 3D EXPANDING BAG
overview: Our M&G 3D Expanding Bag is a stylish and functional accessory that is perfect for keeping your documents organized. It features a unique 3D design that adds a touch of personality to your workspace. The file is available in two different colours, allowing you to choose the one that best suits your style. With multiple compartments, this file can hold a large number of documents while keeping them neat and organized. It is made from high-quality materials, making it durable and long-lasting. This expanding bag file is the perfect accessory for anyone who wants to keep their documents organized in style.

title: M&G ECONOMIC 0.16MM PP FILE BAG WITH BUTTON ( A4 )
subtitle: M&G ECONOMIC 0.16MM PP
overview: Introducing the M&G Economic PP 0.16MM File Bag with Button (A4), a durable and affordable solution for file organization. Crafted from high-quality polypropylene, it offers superior strength and tear resistance, keeping your important documents safe. The button closure provides secure storage, while the transparent window allows easy identification without opening the bag. With its waterproof design, this file bag is versatile for school, business, and home use, making it a practical choice to keep your files organized.

title: M&G PVC ZIPPER BAG ( A5 )
subtitle: M&G PVC ZIPPER BAG
overview: Discover the M&G PVC Zipper Bag, a versatile and durable storage solution. Made from high-quality PVC material, it offers water resistance and flexibility. The clear PVC window allows easy content identification, while the zipper closure securely protects your belongings. Its portability makes it suitable for on-the-go use, and it comes in A4 and A5 sizes to fit various needs. Available in multiple colors, this bag is perfect for storing documents, files, and more in offices, schools, and homes.

subtitle: M&G EXPANDING FILE (
overview: The M&G Expandable File offers durable and versatile document organization.
